articles.author: Clea Caulcutt
articles.title: Europe to accelerate effort to secure Hormuz despite Trump’s order to ‘STAY AWAY’ - politico.eu
articles.description: More than 30 leaders joined a video conference call on Friday to map out an international mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.content:
But the exact details of a potential international mission remain sketchy.

articles.author: Sam McNeil, Justin Spike
articles.title: EU officials in Hungary to discuss unlocking billions of euros held while Orbán was in charge - AP News
articles.description: European Union officials are meeting Friday in Budapest with Hungary's incoming leader Péter Magyar's team. They're discussing issues like a massive loan for Ukraine and unlocking about 17 billion euros withheld during Viktor Orbán's rule. Magyar will take po…
articles.content: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) European Union officials are meeting Friday in Budapest with members of Hungarian election winner Péter Magyars team about pressing issues including a massive loan for Ukraine … [+5133 chars]
